center.name: 特羅布里恩群島
center.summary: 特羅布里恩群島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Purple-bellied lory，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in south-east New Guinea, the Bismarck Archipelago, the d'Entrecasteaux Islands, the Louisiade Archipelago, the Trobriand Islands and Woodlark Island

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in south-east New Guinea, the Bismarck Archipelago, the d'Entrecasteaux Islands, the Louisiade Archipelago, the Trobriand Islands and Woodlark Island
